events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk. Installing a breaker not listed/UL Classified for the specific panelboard violates NEC 110.3(B) (equipment must be used per its listing) and the panel's short-circuit/physical compatibility basis under NEC 240 — a fire/arc-flash hazard, not just a paperwork issue. Flagged for replacement with a panel-listed device before closeout, with re-verification of 110.14(C) termination temps and 210.8/210.12 protection requirements once corrected.
